title: vitex rotundifolia f. heterophylla
intro: Vitex rotundifolia f. heterophylla, also known as the Korean chaste tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitex rotundifolia f. heterophylla include reducing stress and anxiety, regulating menstrual cycles, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
